title: AlgoSec Diagnostic Framework
description: Runtime-backed framework for diagnostic playbooks, evidence, and support workflows.

  label: Overview
  order: 1
---

# AlgoSec Diagnostic Framework

Support Cockpit is the current interaction model for the Starlight publisher.

<div class="adf-home-shell">
  <div class="adf-home-topbar">
    <div class="adf-panel">
      <p class="adf-panel-label">Live baseline</p>
      <p>algosec-lab on algosec running Rocky Linux 8.10 (Green Obsidian).</p>
    </div>
    <div class="adf-panel">
      <p class="adf-panel-label">Observed scope</p>
      <p>263 services, 58 listeners, 114 config checkpoints, 109 log checkpoints.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

## First response

<div class="adf-home-grid">
  <div class="adf-panel">
    <p class="adf-panel-label">How to use this site</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Confirm the customer appliance hostname, OS family, and any visible build markers against the lab baseline.</li>
      <li>Check whether the top AlgoSec services are active and enabled in the customer environment.</li>
      <li>Compare Apache-routed endpoints and local listener ports before moving into deeper service-specific diagnosis.</li>
      <li>Use the recorded config and log checkpoints for the top services before inferring broader platform issues.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="adf-panel">
    <p class="adf-panel-label">Why this shape</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Quick jump stays visible while you read lower command content.</li>
      <li>Each checkpoint stays collapsed until you need it.</li>
      <li>The JSON baseline stays canonical. This page is only a render.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

## Playbooks

<div class="adf-home-card-grid">
<a class="adf-home-card" href="/playbooks/asms-ui-is-down/">
  <p class="adf-panel-label">ui-and-proxy</p>
  <strong>ASMS UI is down</strong>
  <span>services: httpd.service, keycloak.service, ms-metro.service</span>
  <span class="adf-home-card-list">
    Check whether the host is under storage, inode, memory, or CPU pressure before blaming the ASMS UI path.
    Confirm Apache/HTTPD can answer local UI traffic and still route toward the auth and app branches.
  </span>
</a>
<a class="adf-home-card" href="/playbooks/fireflow-backend/">
  <p class="adf-panel-label">core-aff</p>
  <strong>FireFlow Backend</strong>
  <span>paths: aff-boot; services: aff-boot.service, algosec-dfs.service, postgresql.service</span>
  <span class="adf-home-card-list">
    Confirm aff-boot.service is active and /FireFlow/api or /aff/api still proxy to localhost:1989.
    Confirm postgresql.service is active before treating FireFlow symptoms as application-only.
  </span>
</a>
<a class="adf-home-card" href="/playbooks/microservice-platform/">
  <p class="adf-panel-label">microservice-platform</p>
  <strong>Microservice Platform</strong>
  <span>paths: ms-batch-application, ms-bflow, ms-cloudlicensing, ms-configuration; services: algobot-microsoft-teams.service, algobot-slack.service, algobot-webex-teams.service, algosec-ms.service, elastic-ssh-tunnel.service, httpd.service</span>
  <span class="adf-home-card-list">
    Confirm algosec-ms.service completed successfully and the top ms-* services are active.
    Compare the routed microservice paths first: ms-batch-application, ms-bflow, ms-cloudlicensing.
  </span>
</a>
<a class="adf-home-card" href="/playbooks/messaging-and-data/">
  <p class="adf-panel-label">messaging-and-data</p>
  <strong>Messaging and Data</strong>
  <span>services: activemq.service, postgresql.service</span>
  <span class="adf-home-card-list">
    Confirm activemq.service is active and listener 61616 is present.
    Confirm postgresql.service is active and local database access is healthy.
  </span>
</a>
</div>

## Symptom lookup

<div class="adf-symptom-grid">
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/asms-ui-is-down/"><strong>ASMS UI is down</strong></a>
  <p>Check whether the host is under storage, inode, memory, or CPU pressure before blaming the ASMS UI path.</p>
  <span>Use ASMS UI is down.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/asms-ui-is-down/"><strong>ASMS login page not loading</strong></a>
  <p>Check whether the host is under storage, inode, memory, or CPU pressure before blaming the ASMS UI path.</p>
  <span>Use ASMS UI is down.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/fireflow-backend/"><strong>FireFlow action failing</strong></a>
  <p>Confirm aff-boot.service is active and /FireFlow/api or /aff/api still proxy to localhost:1989.</p>
  <span>Use FireFlow Backend.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/fireflow-backend/"><strong>FireFlow API error</strong></a>
  <p>Confirm aff-boot.service is active and /FireFlow/api or /aff/api still proxy to localhost:1989.</p>
  <span>Use FireFlow Backend.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/microservice-platform/"><strong>Feature failing behind UI</strong></a>
  <p>Confirm algosec-ms.service completed successfully and the top ms-* services are active.</p>
  <span>Use Microservice Platform.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/microservice-platform/"><strong>Specific microservice path failing</strong></a>
  <p>Confirm algosec-ms.service completed successfully and the top ms-* services are active.</p>
  <span>Use Microservice Platform.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/messaging-and-data/"><strong>Job stuck or not progressing</strong></a>
  <p>Confirm activemq.service is active and listener 61616 is present.</p>
  <span>Use Messaging and Data.</span>
</div>
<div class="adf-symptom-card">
  <a class="adf-symptom-link" href="/playbooks/messaging-and-data/"><strong>Data-backed action failing</strong></a>
  <p>Confirm activemq.service is active and listener 61616 is present.</p>
  <span>Use Messaging and Data.</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
